sanskrit_text: karmany evadhikaras te ma phalesu kadacana
transliteration_text: karmany evadhikaras te ma phalesu kadacana
english_text: You have a right to perform your duty, but not to the fruits of your actions.
hindi_text: Karma par adhikar rakho, phal par asakti mat rakho.
insight_caption: This insight explains how action gains meaning when it is performed with discipline rather than attachment.

sanskrit_text: yogasthah kuru karmani sangam tyaktva dhananjaya
transliteration_text: yogasthah kuru karmani sangam tyaktva dhananjaya
english_text: Perform your work with steadiness of mind, free from attachment and inner restlessness.
hindi_text: Sthirata ke saath karma karo, asakti aur chanchalta ko chhodkar.
insight_caption: The emphasis here is on mental steadiness: right action becomes clearer when the mind is not pulled in every direction.

english_text: One who acts with wisdom rises above both success and failure, merit and blame.
hindi_text: Buddhi se yukta vyakti safalta-asafalta aur punya-pap ke paar uthta hai.
insight_caption: This verse highlights equanimity: wise action is not defined by external reward, but by inner clarity.

sanskrit_text: karmajam buddhi-yukta hi phalam tyaktva manisinah
transliteration_text: karmajam buddhi-yukta hi phalam tyaktva manisinah
english_text: The wise release attachment to results and act from clarity rather than pressure.
hindi_text: Gyani log phal ki asakti chhodkar spashta buddhi se karma karte hain.
insight_caption: This verse redirects attention from reward to the quality of awareness behind action.

sanskrit_text: yoga-sthah kuru karmani sangam tyaktva dhananjaya
transliteration_text: yoga-sthah kuru karmani sangam tyaktva dhananjaya
english_text: Stand in balance and do your work, leaving behind emotional attachment.
hindi_text: Samatva mein sthit hokar apna karma karo aur asakti ko chhod do.
insight_caption: Action becomes disciplined when it arises from inward balance rather than inner turbulence.

english_text: Equanimity is yoga because balanced awareness gives action its true steadiness.
hindi_text: Samatva ko yoga kaha gaya hai kyunki santulit chetna karma ko sthirata deti hai.
insight_caption: This verse frames yoga as a disciplined steadiness that shapes both thought and action.

sanskrit_text: yogah karmasu kausalam samatvam yoga ucyate
transliteration_text: yogah karmasu kausalam samatvam yoga ucyate
english_text: Yoga is skill in action; balance and precision give work its highest value.
hindi_text: Yoga karma ki kala hai; santulan aur sahi drishti karma ko ucch muly deti hai.
insight_caption: This insight explains that action is not just about effort. It is also about composure, timing, and the ability to remain balanced while acting.

sanskrit_text: niyatam kuru karma tvam karma jyayo hy akarmanah
transliteration_text: niyatam kuru karma tvam karma jyayo hy akarmanah
english_text: Perform the work that is yours to do; committed action is better than avoidance.
hindi_text: Apne niyat kartavya ko karo; karma se bachna uchit marg nahin hai.
insight_caption: This verse turns the teaching toward responsibility, insisting that sincere action is better than passive avoidance.

sanskrit_text: yajnarthat karmano nyatra loko yam karma-bandhanah
transliteration_text: yajnarthat karmano nyatra loko yam karma-bandhanah
english_text: Action done for a higher purpose liberates, while self-centered action binds the mind.
hindi_text: Ucch uddeshya ke liye kiya gaya karma mukti deta hai, swayam ke liye kiya gaya karma bandh deta hai.
insight_caption: This verse expands the teaching from duty into sacred intention and inner freedom.

english_text: Perform action for that larger purpose, free from possessiveness and grasping.
hindi_text: Us bade uddeshya ke liye asakti se mukt hokar karma karo.
insight_caption: Detached action here means serving sincerely without turning work into self-ownership.

english_text: When action aligns with a larger order, it participates in something beyond the individual ego.
hindi_text: Jab karma vishal niyam se judta hai, tab vah aham se pare ek bade kram ka hissa ban jata hai.
insight_caption: This verse places action inside a larger moral and spiritual rhythm.

sanskrit_text: annad bhavanti bhutani yajnad bhavati parjanyah
transliteration_text: annad bhavanti bhutani yajnad bhavati parjanyah
english_text: Life is sustained through reciprocal order, where action supports a larger cycle of nourishment and balance.
hindi_text: Jeevan parasparik kram se chalta hai jahan karma poshan aur santulan ke bade chakra ko sahara deta hai.
insight_caption: The verse broadens action into participation in the sustaining order of life.

sanskrit_text: annad bhavanti bhutani yajnad bhavati parjanyah
transliteration_text: annad bhavanti bhutani yajnad bhavati parjanyah
english_text: Life is sustained through reciprocal order, where action supports a larger cycle of nourishment and balance.
hindi_text: Jeevan parasparik kram se chalta hai jahan karma poshan aur santulan ke bade chakra ko sahara deta hai.
insight_caption: The verse broadens action into participation in the sustaining order of life.

sanskrit_text: annad bhavanti bhutani yajnad bhavati parjanyah
transliteration_text: annad bhavanti bhutani yajnad bhavati parjanyah
english_text: Life is sustained through reciprocal order, where action supports a larger cycle of nourishment and balance.
hindi_text: Jeevan parasparik kram se chalta hai jahan karma poshan aur santulan ke bade chakra ko sahara deta hai.
insight_caption: The verse broadens action into participation in the sustaining order of life.
